def: A basket used to hold dirty or clean laundry.
A household machine that washes clothes.
Powdered detergent used for washing clothes in a machine.
To put things back in their proper place and clean up.
A pale, light shade of the color blue.
A synthetic fiber or fabric used to make clothing and textiles.
A piece of writing published in a newspaper.
A long fictional story published as a book.
A piece of writing arranged in verse, often with rhythm or rhyme.
A person you know but who is not a close friend.
A written or spoken account of what something is like.
A set of linked pages published on the internet at one address.
A card you can write a short message on and mail without an envelope.
A statement that tells you what you must or must not do.
A dish or product that a person or place is especially known for.
A trip or outing taken by bicycle.
An outdoor meal eaten outside, often on grass or in a park.
The first public performance or showing of a play or film.
To exercise the body through movements such as jumping, stretching, and balancing.
To become calm and free of stress or tension.
To make a happy expression by curving the corners of your mouth.
To experience images and thoughts while asleep, or to hope for something.
To test something to see how it works or whether you like it.
Not closed; able to be entered, visited, or used.
Accurate and free of mistakes.
Extremely good or pleasing; marvelous.
On some occasions but not always or often.
At a time after the present moment or after a stated point.
To originate from, or have one's home in, a particular place.
A list of dishes and drinks offered at a restaurant.
Constructed using wood as the material; wooden.
An outer garment with sleeves, worn over other clothes.
